name: Shadow Web
author: ulinycoin
description: Agent-facing web interaction toolkit. Compress HTML to action maps, drive browsers via Playwright, extract structured data (tables, forms, lists), search the web, and fill forms — all from MCP.

tools.name: navigate
tools.description: Open URL in Playwright and build XML action map snapshot

tools.name: snapshot
tools.description: Refresh current page snapshot with optional diff

tools.name: click
tools.description: Click element by data-sid on the current page

tools.name: web_search
tools.description: Search the web via Brave Search (Yahoo fallback)

tools.name: query_page
tools.description: Filter current page actions by type, intent, group, or label

tools.name: compress_html
tools.description: Compress raw HTML into clean markup, action map, and semantic groups

tools.name: compress_html_to_xml
tools.description: Return grouped XML action map for raw HTML

tools.name: schema_table
tools.description: Extract structured table data from HTML

tools.name: schema_page
tools.description: Extract all structured data from HTML at once

tools.name: schema_session
tools.description: Extract structured data from current browser session

tools.name: content_outline
tools.description: Build a content outline from current page (text blocks, headings, token counts)

tools.name: content_blocks
tools.description: Fetch content blocks by IDs from content outline

tools.name: form_fill_plan
tools.description: Build form fill plan from profile JSON

tools.name: form_fill_execute
tools.description: Execute form fill plan with answers

tools.name: webmcp_list_tools
tools.description: Detect WebMCP tools on the current page

tools.name: webmcp_execute_tool
tools.description: Execute a WebMCP tool by name
